title: MacOS-Input-Fix
description: Fixes macOS-specific input issues where movement keys don't resume after closing inventory screens
body:
# MacOS-Input-Fix
Fixes macOS-specific input issues where movement keys don't resume after closing inventory screens.

This will **fix** the sequence:
- player holds w, walking forward
- player presses inventory key while still holding w
- player releases inventory key and does not keep walking forward

After this mod is installed, the player will continue walking forward after closing the inventory. This is for parity on other operating systems.

_This mod has been verified for use on mcpvp, and has **not** flagged anticheats such as Grim and Vulcan_, however I still feel the need for a disclaimer that this mod should only be used if you are sure you can use it. However, it should be fine for servers because it just makes MacOS input behave the same as other operating systems.
